{{Quote|I may not be your Master, but I am your friend. |Elora Sund to Tae Diath|<ref name="Star Wars: Republic: The Battle of Jabiim">''[[Star Wars: Republic: The Battle of Jabiim]]''</ref>}}
'''Elora Sund''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]], Elora Sund was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the decade marked by the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] which plagued the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] until the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], Sund crafted a green-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and took up the rank of [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Early in the war, Sund lost her master to the war and she became a member of the [[Padawan Pack]] on [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] during the [[Battle of Jabiim|fighting there]]. In addition to her lightsaber, Sund was trained in the use of a [[Vibroknife/Legends|vibroknife]], which she was fond of using in battle in conjunction with her lightsaber or a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].<ref name="R56" />

[[File:EloraSundDeath.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Elora Sund dies from psychic backlash.]]

Along with the other masterless Padawans, Sund was forced to adjust to the ever-changing battlefield conditions without the instruction of a master. Commandeering a pair of repuslorlift boots to move around with easy over the muddy ground, Sund found herself fond of fellow Padawan [[Tae Diath]] as the group grew closer and closer throughout the fighting. Forming a [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] link with Diath, she encouraged him to find peace within his mind as he mourned the death of his own master, [[Nico Diath]]. During the final battle with rebel leader [[Alto Stratus]], Diath was slain by a group of assassin droids. When Diath died, Sund's mental link betrayed her as she suffered from psychic backlash. Overcome by Diath's death resonating through her mind, Sund died instantly of heart failure.<ref name="R57" /> Like countless other Jedi since the dawn of the Republic, Sund's name was added to the [[Jedi monument (New Holstice)|Jedi monument]] on [[New Holstice/Legends|New Holstice]] as the survivors of the battle whispered her name into the wings of the immortal [[Memory moth/Legends|memory moths]] flying in the monument.<ref name="R58">[[Republic 58|''Republic'' 58]]</ref>
